candidate_llm_application: LLM aesthetic-mode spectral allocation: route nine canonical emotion-tokens across attention heads; the dominant rasa allocates the head-routing share to produce evocation.

results.title: Moe Expert Routing For Emotion-Conditioned Generation: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on MoE expert routing for emotion-conditioned generation, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (MoE expert routing for emotion-conditioned generation); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (classical-Indian-poetics terms vs LLM terms).
results.matched_effect_cluster: MoE expert routing for emotion-conditioned generation
